problemInput.name: Problem
problemInput.text: Provide a short description of your problem

common.privacyCheck: I agree to send the above information and system data from my computer to HP. I also agree to have software installed on my computer that may facilitate remote communication and desktop sharing with a support technician.
common.openCaseForRepairProduct: We have opened a support case for the repair of product {Nickname}. You will receive a box within 2 to 3 business days to ship your device back to us.
common.fillRepairRequest: Please fill out the Repair Request form and follow the packing and shipping instructions for your device.
common.caseHasBeenClosedThankYou: Your case has been closed. Thank you for contacting HP Support.
common.extendCoverage: Extend your HP support coverage today.
common.provideShortDescriptionOfProblem: Provide a short descripition of your problem
common.privacyTermsConditionsCheckMessage: I agree to send the above information and system data from my computer to HP, and have software installed on my computer that may facilitate remote communication and desktop sharing with a support technician.
common.createCaseDescription: To make sure we fully understand your problem, tell us the issue you’re facing below. Once completed, we will create a support case and give you the phone number to speak with an agent.
common.ourAgentsAreHPTechSpecialists: Our agents are HP tech specialists
common.areYouSureToEndChatSession: Are you sure you want to end your chat session? You will need to start a new session if you still need help.
common.myHPOutsideOfHour: myHP - Outside of hour of operation
common.mondayThroughFriday: Monday through Friday 8:00am to 5:00pm Eastern Time
common.supportCenterIsClosedPleaseTryAgain: We are sorry. The Support Centre is closed at this time. Please try again during the hours listed above.
common.thisMayTakeUpTo60s: This may take up to 60 seconds. Please wait.
common.addDeviceToHPAccount: Add this device to your HP account
common.addDeviceByClickTheButton: For the most optimal Support experience, your device must be added into your HP account. Clicking the Yes button below will allow you to connect with support agents directly and to keep track of your assigned support cases.
common.learnHowGetDeviceRepaired: Learn how to get your HP device repaired
common.locateNearestServiceCenters: Locate your nearest HP service centres
common.yourChatSessionWillClose: If you leave the Support site, your chat session will close. You will need to start a new session if you still need help.
common.reviewGuidesToLearnYourDevice: Review guides to learn about your device
common.pleaseDescribTheIssue: Please describe the issue you're experiencing so we can offer the most effective help. We will supply agent contact information after you click "Chat now".
common.allowPersonalizedSupportDescription: HP may use information about my system to provide me with customer support. Enable my PC to show HP contact options, warranty information, and important support messages.
common.speakToAgentToGetHelp: Speak to an agent to get help with your product
common.unexpectedErrorOccured: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
common.limitOf10CasesReached: A limit of 10 cases per day has been reached. Please try again later.
common.addThisDeviceToYourHPAccount: Add this device to your HP account
common.forTheMostOptimalSupportExperience: For the most optimal Support experience, your device must be added to your HP account. Clicking the Yes button below will allow you to connect with support agents directly and to keep track of your assigned support cases.
common.checkTheProblemAndTryAgain: Please check the problem description, and then try again.
common.describTheIssueClickChatNow: Please describe the issue you're experiencing so we can offer the most effective help. We will supply agent contact information after you click "Chat now".

speakToAgent.title: Speak to an agent
speakToAgent.callHPTechDetail: Call an agent to get help with your product. Ask your agent about Live Lens, a quick, interactive one-way video support option from your mobile device.
speakToAgent.createCaseDescription: To make sure we fully understand your problem, tell us the issue you’re facing below. Once completed, we will create a support case and give you the phone number to speak with an agent.

phoneCase.writeDownCaseNumber: Please be sure to write down your case number and give it to the Support Agent when you call.

callMeBack.title: Call me back
callMeBack.description: Most calls are returned in 15 minutes
callMeBack.subTitle: Get a call from an HP Tech specialist.
callMeBack.detail: Most calls are returned within 15 minutes, based on call volume.

chatWindow.discribTheIssue: Please describe the issue you’re experiencing so we can offer the most effective help. We will supply agent contact information after you click Chat now.
chatWindow.keepChatSession: Would you like to keep your current chat session active in the background?
chatWindow.toCloseActiveSession: Would you like to close the active session?
